title: Senior Teacher - Resonance International Enterprises - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Resonance International Enterprises - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Resonance International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Resonance International Enterprises:
Resonance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance International Enterprises!
